properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v5 v10 v11 v12 v13 v5 v14

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In ancient times God built a monument At the dawn of creation He hallowed and blessed Those moments of rest day of complete veneration

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: That pillar He made Not of stone, but of time The hours were sacred The idea divine And the morning stars sang For joy they did shine And shout, that first week of creation

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And lest they forget He made angels' food fall Down from the sky, on all days but one And He wrote it down For the sake of us all Among the ten rules on the stone

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Those rules about murder And stealing, and lying Engraving with blazing finger, defying Whoever in heaven or hell should endeavor To change the commandments He wrote

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Here is the patience of the saints Here are those who keep The commandments of God And the faith of Jesus

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Then came God's own Son To show us the way He hallowed that same Sabbath day The pure Lamb of God As our soil He trod In God's perfect will He did stay

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: 'Til heaven and earth Shall indeed pass away Not one dot or one dash Will be changed, He did say The apostles of old Kept and honored, we're told That same law that their Master obeyed

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: For three hundred years After our Savior died And arose from the grave and ascended on high The Christians respected The law in the stone The one written with finger divine

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: But then came the day Constantine was his name The emperor who over Rome did reign Tore down the old landmark The pillar of God And erected the day of the sun

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: As millennia passed The memory of God's pillar of time Was slowly erased By the ceaseless waves of generations Of human traditions and days But God calls His people Out from among them To point to His word And light up the darkness And restore the knowledge Of God's special covenant Preserved from the dawning of time

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Lest you think that the crowds Can't be wrong today Remember the crowd In a land far away The mob who blindly Rejected their King And the pride of the priests And their deadly sting As the jealous, lying accusations they bring And they murder their humble Messiah

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: The beast left its mark On the pages of time Pushed a heathen day In place of the divine Thought to change times and laws The laws that God's finger Engraved on the tables of stone

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: Those who oppose it, it tramples and kills That city that sits on seven hills That mark it causes Small and great to receive On forehead or hand On thought or in deed It cares not whether you're really deceived Or just afraid, and so follow its lead

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: Remember (If you love Me, keep my commandments) Remember (If you love Me, keep my commandments) Remember
